description_long: This object is a vintage-style megaphone with a robust cylindrical body made of metal, painted in a muted blue-green color. The front features a large, flared metallic horn with a slightly tarnished, reflective surface, designed to project sound efficiently. A sturdy, curved metal handle arches over the top, providing a secure grip for carrying or holding the device. On one side, there is a solid, rounded handle for one-handed operation, and a triangular caution symbol is visible on the main body, suggesting electrical components inside. The rear of the megaphone displays a metallic latch and several rivets, indicating a compartment or access panel. The overall construction appears industrial and durable, suitable for outdoor or urban environments.
description: A vintage, industrial megaphone with a large flared horn, blue-green metal body, and prominent carrying handle. Features include a side grip, caution symbol, and metallic rear latch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flared horn and the arched carrying handle above the body.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the side handle, caution symbol, and the depth of the horn.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the metallic latch, rivets, and the back of the carrying handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the side handle and the horn's profile.
attribute_mouthpiece_design: Large, circular, flared metallic horn with a smooth, concave surface and no visible covering.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Triangular caution symbol on the body; no other visible branding or text.
